Calendula Cream

✓ In Stock

A soothing cream infused with calendula flowers and chamomile essential oil; a rich avocado-cream base for moisturising dry or sensitive skin

Product Options

Ingredients

Purified Water, Avocado Oil, Sweet Almond Oil, Soybean Oil, Calendula Flowers, Cetearyl Alcohol, PE-20 Stearate, Cocoa Butter, Glycerine, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Rosehip Oil, Jojoba Oil, Chamomile Essential Oil, Natural Vitamin E, Propanediol and Rosemary Leaf Extract

Sourced from multiple origins

Important Information

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
